title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: lightweight, extensible framework for running Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma and other LLMs locally on macOS, Linux, and Windows.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, push models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same API surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama models as standard LangChain LLMs & embedders.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Open-source ChatGPT-style web interface for Ollama; manage models & conversations in the browser.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI wrapper around Ollama with readline history & syntax highlighting.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot replacement for inline suggestions.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Minimal Tauri desktop app for chatting with Ollama models; Windows, macOS, Linux builds.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin SDK for Ollama; chat, pull, list, delete models via simple POJOs.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators & embedders in NLP pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community-maintained C#/.NET client for Ollama with async IAsyncEnumerable streaming.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem wrapping Ollama’s REST API; chat, embed, list, pull models idiomatically.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Official Docker Compose stacks for CPU & GPU (CUDA/ROCm) deployments of Ollama plus optional web UI.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with autoscaling and PVC support.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Ready-to-run RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma + LangChain for private document Q&A.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Discord.py bot that exposes Ollama models as slash commands for servers.

title: ollama-macos-menu
summary: Swift native macOS menu-bar app to start/stop Ollama service and pick models from the tray.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix derivation for Ollama enabling reproducible installs on NixOS with GPU drivers.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds an Ollama sidebar for summarizing notes and Q&A over your vault.

title: ollama-ray
summary: Ray Serve example deploying Ollama models for scalable batch inference across a cluster.
